steps.title: Express the length in terms of the given information
steps.content:
Width = \$7$ cm. The length is \$40$ cm longer than the width, so:
$$\text{Length} = 7 + 40 = 47 \text{ cm}$$

steps.title: Calculate the area
steps.content:
Area of rectangle = width × length:
$$7 \times 47 = 329 \text{ cm}^2$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
